controls.title: Application Gateways must have tags
controls.description: Application Gateways must include ownership, environment, and governance metadata.
controls.remediation: Add the required organizational tags to the Application Gateway.

controls.title: Application Gateway listeners must use HTTPS
controls.description: Application Gateway client listeners must encrypt ingress traffic with HTTPS.
controls.remediation: Remove HTTP listeners or replace them with HTTPS listeners that reference an approved TLS certificate.

controls.title: Application Gateway WAF policies must inspect request bodies
controls.description: Request body inspection enables WAF managed rules to detect attacks in request payloads.

controls.title: Application Gateway WAF policies must limit request body size
controls.description: A defined request body limit reduces exposure to oversized request payloads.
controls.remediation: Set policy_settings.max_request_body_size_in_kb = 128 or update this organizational standard to the approved workload-specific value.

controls.title: Application Gateways should send access and firewall logs to Log Analytics
controls.description: Centralized Application Gateway access and WAF logs support traffic analysis, security monitoring, and incident response.
controls.remediation: Create an azurerm_monitor_diagnostic_setting targeting the Application Gateway and enable ApplicationGatewayAccessLog and ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog, or the allLogs category group.

controls.title: Application Gateways must use the latest approved SSL policy
controls.description: The latest approved predefined SSL policy enforces modern protocols and cipher suites.

controls.title: Application Gateways must enable WAF
controls.description: Application Gateways must use the WAF_v2 tier and associate an approved Web Application Firewall policy.
controls.remediation: Use sku.tier = "WAF_v2" and associate the gateway with an azurerm_web_application_firewall_policy.

controls.title: Application Gateway WAF policies must use prevention mode
controls.description: Prevention mode blocks requests that match managed or custom WAF rules.

controls.title: Application Gateway WAF policies must have tags
controls.description: WAF policies must include ownership, environment, and governance metadata.
controls.remediation: Add the required organizational tags to the WAF policy.

controls.title: Application Gateway must enable HTTP/2
controls.description: Application Gateway should use HTTP/2 for modern encrypted client connections.

controls.title: Application Gateway should enable FIPS mode
controls.description: FIPS mode should be enabled for workloads requiring validated cryptographic implementations.
controls.remediation: Set fips_enabled = true when required by the workload compliance profile.
